ddls:
CREATE TABLE "color_combinations" (
  "combination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each color combination */,
  "red_intensity" INTEGER /* Intensity level of the red LED (0-255) */,
  "green_intensity" INTEGER /* Intensity level of the green LED (0-255) */,
  "blue_intensity" INTEGER /* Intensity level of the blue LED (0-255) */,
  "resultant_color" TEXT /* Resultant color from the combination */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the combination was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the combination was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the color combination */,
  "is_predefined" INTEGER /* Indicates if the combination is predefined by the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("combination_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "combination_id" INTEGER /* ID of the color combination */,
  "favorite" INTEGER /* Indicates if the combination is a favorite */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the user has used this combination */,
  "last_used" TEXT /* Timestamp when the combination was last used */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* User's rating for the combination (1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_combination_id FOREIGN KEY ("combination_id") REFERENCES color_combinations ("combination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scenes" (
  "scene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scene */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the scene */,
  "scene_name" TEXT /* Name of the scene */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the scene */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the scene was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the scene was last updated */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates if the scene is public and can be shared */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scenes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scene_combinations" (
  "scene_combination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scene-color combination */,
  "scene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the scene */,
  "combination_id" INTEGER /* ID of the color combination */,
  "sequence" INTEGER /* Order in which the color combination appears in the scene */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration for which the color combination should be active in the scene */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scene_combination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scene_combinations_combination_id FOREIGN KEY ("combination_id") REFERENCES color_combinations ("combination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scene_combinations_scene_id FOREIGN KEY ("scene_id") REFERENCES scenes ("scene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the schedule */,
  "scene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the scene to be activated */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Time when the scene should start */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Time when the scene should end */,
  "repeat" TEXT /* Repeat pattern for the schedule (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the schedule was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the schedule was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the schedule is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_scene_id FOREIGN KEY ("scene_id") REFERENCES scenes ("scene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., basic, premium) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* User-specific settings and preferences */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "usage_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "combination_id" INTEGER /* ID of the color combination used */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the action occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., select, save, activate) */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device used to access the system */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location from where the action was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_logs_combination_id FOREIGN KEY ("combination_id") REFERENCES color_combinations ("combination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_logs_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of the device (e.g., mobile, web) */,
  "last_used" TEXT /* Timestamp when the device was last used */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the device is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)
